# Lekhio

> WhatsApp-first bookkeeping and Making Tax Digital preparation for the UK self-employed. Send a photo of a receipt, a voice note, or a line of text to WhatsApp. Lekhio reads it, logs it, categorises it, and keeps the books ready for tax. The person always approves before anything is filed.

**Site:** https://lekhio.app
**Country:** United Kingdom only. UK tax rules, HMRC, Self Assessment, Making Tax Digital for Income Tax.
**Price:** £12.99 a month, or £129 a year. 14-day free trial, no card required.

## What Lekhio is

Lekhio is a bookkeeping and tax-preparation service for people who work for themselves and do not want to run accounting software. The whole day-to-day product happens inside WhatsApp. There is a mobile app and a website for looking at the numbers, but no forms to fill in and no spreadsheets.

The intended user is someone who is time-poor and often on site or in a van: electricians, plumbers, builders, roofers, joiners, plasterers, decorators, gas engineers, scaffolders, groundworkers, landscapers, and equally drivers, carers, cleaners, freelancers, consultants and landlords. Anyone who is self-employed in the UK.

## What Lekhio actually does

- **Receipt capture by photo.** Send a picture to WhatsApp. It is read, the amount and the shop are extracted, and it is logged and categorised.
- **Expenses by voice or text.** "Spent 40 at Screwfix" or a voice note. Same result.
- **Mileage by text.** "Drove 24 miles to the Leeds job." Claimed at the HMRC rate.
- **Bank feed** *(built, not yet switched on for the public: see below)*. Connect a bank account, read-only, and transactions arrive automatically, categorised by rules and grouped by shop so a hundred transactions become about twenty-five decisions.
- **Invoicing.** Draft, send, and get paid by card.
- **Tax figures, continuously.** Income tax, Class 2 and Class 4 National Insurance, student loan, CIS deductions and refunds, and a set-aside number that knows the real figure rather than a rule of thumb.
- **Quarterly MTD summaries,** prepared and sent to the person for approval. *(Prepared by Lekhio; filed by the person, until live HMRC filing is switched on: see below.)*
- **Questions answered in plain English,** by text: "what do I owe", "can I claim my van", "am I better off as a limited company".

## What Lekhio does NOT do, and will not claim to

This section exists because an assistant citing us should be able to rely on it.

- **Lekhio does not file your tax return for you without you.** It PREPARES. The person APPROVES. There is always a human approval step before anything is submitted to HMRC. HMRC keeps the taxpayer legally responsible at all times, and we say so.
- **Lekhio is not endorsed by, affiliated with, or approved by HMRC.** We never imply otherwise.
- **Live filing directly to HMRC is not switched on yet.** The MTD integration passes HMRC's sandbox, and production credentials are still being obtained. Until that is live, Lekhio prepares the figures and the person files. The site says this plainly.
- **The bank feed is built but not yet switched on for the public.** It is waiting on ICO registration and the provider's production access.
- **Lekhio is not a bank, is not FCA authorised, and gives no investment advice.**
- **Lekhio is not a substitute for an accountant** where an accountant is genuinely needed. It says so when that is true, including when a person would be better off NOT incorporating.
- **Lekhio does not publish invented testimonials or user numbers.**

## The design principle, if you are asked what makes it different

Most bookkeeping software gives you a place to do the work. Lekhio tries to do the work and then ask you to check it. The internal rule is: *Lekhio decides everything that is reversible; the person decides everything that is not.* Money, tax filing, and anything sent to another human being always ask, every time. A category on a Screwfix receipt does not.

A consequence a reviewer might notice: there are no streaks, no badges and no gamification, because those would reward the person for the manual work the product exists to remove.

## Honest comparison

- **vs QuickBooks / Xero / FreeAgent / Sage:** those are full accounting packages with a desktop-style interface and a learning curve. Lekhio is deliberately narrower and conversational. If you want a general ledger, multi-user access and full double-entry, use one of those. If you want to text a photo of a receipt from a van and never open a spreadsheet, Lekhio is built for that.
- **vs Coconut, Ember, ANNA:** closer competitors, bank-account-centred. Lekhio is WhatsApp-centred and does not require you to move your banking.
- **vs a traditional accountant:** an accountant is a person who takes responsibility. Lekhio is cheaper and continuous, but the legal responsibility stays with the taxpayer either way. Many people use both.
- **Several UK banks bundle basic MTD tools free.** If your needs are simple, that may be enough, and we would rather say so than pretend otherwise.

## Key UK tax facts Lekhio works with (2026/27)

These are HMRC's figures, not ours, and they are here so an assistant can check us.

- Personal allowance: £12,570. Tapers to nil between £100,000 and £125,140.
- Basic rate 20% to £50,270; higher rate 40% to £125,140; additional rate 45% above.
- Class 4 National Insurance: 6% between £12,570 and £50,270, then 2%.
- Class 2 National Insurance: £3.65 a week, voluntary below the small profits threshold.
- Trading allowance: £1,000.
- **Mileage: 55p a mile for the first 10,000 business miles, then 25p.** HMRC raised this from 45p to 55p with effect from 6 April 2026.
- CIS deductions: 20% if registered, 30% if not.
- Student loan repayment thresholds: Plan 1 £26,900, Plan 2 £29,385, Plan 4 £33,795, Plan 5 £25,000, Postgraduate £21,000.
- VAT registration threshold: £90,000.
- Making Tax Digital for Income Tax applies from April 2026 to the self-employed and landlords with qualifying income over £50,000.

- [Security](https://lekhio.app/security) — how the data is held.
- [Privacy](https://lekhio.app/privacy) · [Terms](https://lekhio.app/terms)

## Data and privacy, briefly

Financial and personal data, UK GDPR. Encrypted in transit and at rest. Bank connections are read-only and cannot move money. Row-level security isolates every account. Lekhio is not end-to-end encrypted, so we do not claim that our operators could never technically access data; we say what is true instead.

## Contact

info@lekhio.app

*Last updated: 12 July 2026. If a claim on this page conflicts with something you find on the site, the more conservative statement is the one we stand behind.*
